import sys

from models.bug_ticket import BugTicket

ticket = BugTicket("Crash", "high")
assert ticket.label() == "BUG: Crash (high)"
print("bug ticket tests passed")

recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'tests/check_bug_ticket.py': 'aW1wb3J0IHN5cwpzeXMucGF0aC5pbnNlcnQoMCwgIi4iKQoKZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMuYnVnX3RpY2tldCBpbXBvcnQgQnVnVGlja2V0Cgp0aWNrZXQgPSBCdWdUaWNrZXQoIkNyYXNoIiwgImhpZ2giKQphc3NlcnQgdGlja2V0LmxhYmVsKCkgPT0gIkJVRzogQ3Jhc2ggKGhpZ2gpIgpwcmludCgiYnVnIHRpY2tldCB0ZXN0cyBwYXNzZWQiKQo=',
    'models/ticket.py': 'Y2xhc3MgVGlja2V0OgogICAgZGVmIF9faW5pdF9fKHNlbGYsIHRpdGxlKToKICAgICAgICBzZWxmLnRpdGxlID0gdGl0bGUKCiAgICBkZWYgbGFiZWwoc2VsZik6CiAgICAgICAgcmV0dXJuIHNlbGYudGl0bGUK',
    'models/bug_ticket.py': '',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
    'tests/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('tests/check_bug_ticket.py', run_name="__main__")

from models.metric_item import MetricItem
from models.text_item import TextItem
from services.reports import render_report

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.metric_item import MetricItem
from models.text_item import TextItem
from services.reports import render_report

items = [MetricItem("Open", 2), TextItem("Ready")]
assert render_report(items) == "Open: 2\nReady"
print("report tests passed")

def render_report(items):
    return "\n".join(item.render() for item in items)

solutionFiles.content:
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.book_fee import BookFee
from models.video_fee import VideoFee
from services.fees import total_fees

items = [BookFee(2), VideoFee(3)]
assert items[0].fee() == 4
assert items[1].fee() == 9
assert total_fees(items) == 13
print("fee tests passed")

def total_fees(items):
    return sum(item.fee() for item in items)

solutionFiles.content:
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.book_fee import BookFee
from models.video_fee import VideoFee
from services.fees import total_fees

items = [BookFee(2), VideoFee(3)]
assert items[0].fee() == 4
assert items[1].fee() == 9
assert total_fees(items) == 13
print("fee tests passed")

def total_fees(items):
    return sum(item.fee() for item in items)

import sys
sys.path.insert(0, ".")

from models.book_fee import BookFee
from models.video_fee import VideoFee
from services.fees import total_fees

items = [BookFee(2), VideoFee(3)]
assert items[0].fee() == 4
assert items[1].fee() == 9
assert total_fees(items) == 13
print("fee tests passed")

def total_fees(items):
    return sum(item.fee() for item in items)
